sectionOne.title: Welcome
sectionOne.subtitle: Start your Web3 journey with BitVoY

sectionTwo.title: BitVoY
sectionTwo.subtitle: Financial adventure starts with a small step — and becomes a shared journey.
sectionTwo.body: BitVoy opens the door to finance and investment, letting anyone safely and intuitively take part in global ventures.

warning.title: Email Setup Required for Easy Recovery
warning.description: The MPC wallet has been successfully initialized, but the email address required for easy recovery has not been set up. By setting up an email address, you can recover your wallet through the Guardian Network using Passkey authentication.

setup.title: Easy Recovery Email Setup
setup.description: By setting up an email address, you can recover your wallet through the Guardian Network in emergency situations. This setup is optional but recommended for enhanced security.

verification.title: Complete Email Verification
verification.description: Please enter the 6-digit authentication code sent to your email to complete the email setup.

restore.description: To restore your previously used account and get started, please click the link:

deepLink.signinRequired: Please log in to connect your wallet.

registration.title: Registration
registration.successMessage: Your wallet has been created successfully!

restoration.title: Restoration Complete!
restoration.message: Your wallet has been restored successfully with JWT authentication!

emailSecurity.title: 🛡️ Enhanced Security for Easy Recovery
emailSecurity.description: Email verification enables secure easy recovery with dual authentication: Email + Passkey biometric/security key verification.

mySetup.title: My Setup
mySetup.notSupported:
To enable push notifications, please:
Add to Home Screen
Update your OS
mySetup.permissionDenied: To enable notifications, please change the settings in Settings > Notifications > BitVoy.
mySetup.paymentSettingsDescription: Configure default chain and token for QR Pay

pwa.waitingForInstallPrompt: Please try again once the add to home screen option is ready.

payments.scanDescription: Scan a QR code to pay
payments.receiveDescription: Generate QR code for receiving payment
payments.unsupportedChain: Unsupported chain. Please use the chain configured in My Setup.
payments.unsupportedToken: Unsupported token. Please use the token configured in My Setup.
